1. dl [`source-code.js`](source-code.js).
2. read [the guide](https://adhi1284.github.io/eee)
3. open it in ur code editor.
4. add or change whatever u want.
5. go 2 [vai-lon-ds.ovfteam.com](https://vai-lon-ds.ovfteam.com/).
6. upload ur edited `source-code.js` in the **client** field.
7. wait a bit for the site 2 build it.
8. dl the new `final.pkg`.
9. replace [`assets/final.pkg`](../assets/final.pkg) with ur new file.
10. restart the client n play.

## important

- keep the output name as `final.pkg`.
- put it in the `assets` folder next 2 the client.
- restart the client every time u replace it.
